name: Inverter Number
notes: CORRECT - value is the sum of all of the connected inverters

name: Inverter Power Type
notes: CORRECT - 3=High Power, 0=Low Power - not sure of significance

outputs.name: PvToBattery
outputs.notes: Energy flowing from Solar to Battery - 0 for EP2000

outputs.name: GridToBattery
outputs.notes: Energy flowing from Grid to Battery - 0 for EP2000

outputs.name: BatteryToGrid
outputs.notes: Energy flowing from Battery to Grid (Exporting) - 0 for EP2000

outputs.name: AcLoad
outputs.notes: Energy flowing to AC Load - 0 for EP2000

outputs.name: DcLoad
outputs.notes: Energy flowing to DC Load - 0 for EP2000

outputs.name: BatteryToInvert
outputs.notes: Battery discharging to Inverter - 0 for EP2000

outputs.name: GridToLoad
outputs.notes: Energy flowing from Grid directly to AC Load - 0 for EP2000

outputs.name: PvIcon
outputs.notes: Solar Panel icon visibility - 0 for EP2000

outputs.name: AcLoadIcon
outputs.notes: AC Load icon visibility - 0 for EP2000

outputs.name: PvToGrid
outputs.notes: Solar energy flowing directly to Grid - 0 for EP2000

outputs.name: PvToACLoad
outputs.notes: Solar energy flowing directly to AC Load - 0 for EP2000

outputs.name: BatteryToACLoad
outputs.notes: Battery energy flowing directly to AC Load - 0 for EP2000

outputs.name: Grid Status
outputs.notes: CORRECT - Grid Connection Status - is 0 for me?

outputs.name: PV Status
outputs.notes: CORRECT - PV (Solar) Input Status - is 0 for me?

outputs.name: Meter Comm
outputs.notes: CORRECT - External Meter Communication Status - is 0 for me?

outputs.name: LED Status
outputs.notes: CORRECT - LED / Display Light Status - is 1 for me

outputs.name: Super Power
outputs.notes: CORRECT - Working Mode / High Power Status - is 0 for me?

name: APP_HOME_DATA: Total DC Power
notes: CORRECT - used for portable batteries that have DC output ports (cigarette lighter socket etc.  Not useful for EP2000

name: APP_HOME_DATA: Consumption Power All
notes: CORRECT - diff between this and 148 may be inverter self-consumption

name: APP_HOME_DATA: PV Input Power All
notes: CORRECT - This is the new DC coupled solar PV production

name: APP_HOME_DATA: Grid Power All
notes: probably is AC coupled inverter production (old PV)

name: APP_HOME_DATA: Total Inverter Power
notes: negative when sunny, battery is charging and solar is covering consumption

name: PV to AC Energy
notes: CORRECT - 0 for EP2000 - only used for smaller batteries?

name: Self-Sufficiency Rate
notes: 0 for me, app says 76% - while Register 164 is the output, the inputs to that number come from: Register 1200 (Total PV Power),Register 1420 (Total AC Load Power),Register 101 (Pack Current / Discharge state

outputs.name: DC Hub
outputs.notes: CORRECT - part of Compononent Online Status bits - 0 for me

outputs.name: AC Hub Controller
outputs.notes: CORRECT - part of Compononent Online Status bits - 0 for me

outputs.name: Grid Meter
outputs.notes: CORRECT - part of Compononent Online Status bits - 0 for me

outputs.name: Load Meter
outputs.notes: CORRECT - part of Compononent Online Status bits - 0 for me

outputs.name: ATS
outputs.notes: CORRECT - part of Compononent Online Status bits - 0 for me

outputs.name: Remote Startup
outputs.notes: CORRECT - part of Compononent Online Status bits - 0 for me

outputs.name: Generator
outputs.notes: CORRECT - part of Compononent Online Status bits - 0 for me

outputs.name: Sub-1GHz Mode
outputs.notes: CORRECT - part of IOT module bits - 0 for me.  0=OFF, 1=Scanning

outputs.name: Upgrade Status
outputs.notes: CORRECT - part of IOT module bits - 0 for me.  0=None, 1=Downloading, 2=Installing

outputs.name: Child Lock
outputs.notes: CORRECT - part of IOT module bits - 0 for me.  0=Disabled, 1=Enabled

outputs.name: Remote Ctrl
outputs.notes: CORRECT - part of IOT module bits - 0 for me.  0=Local only, 1=Remote allowed

outputs.name: WiFi Mesh
outputs.notes: CORRECT - part of IOT module bits - 0 for me.  0=Off, 1=Scanning

outputs.name: IoT Error
outputs.notes: CORRECT - part of IOT module bits - 0 for me

outputs.name: BMS Error
outputs.notes: CORRECT - part of IOT module bits - 0 for me.

outputs.name: AT1 Error
outputs.notes: CORRECT - part of IOT module bits - 0 for me.

outputs.name: Sys Upgrade Type
outputs.notes: CORRECT - part of IOT module bits - 0 for me.

name: Scene Flag
notes: CORRECT - 0 for me.  0=Home, 1=Balcony, 2=Balcony2.  used for background images in app

name: Sleep Standby Time
notes: CORRECT - 0 for me.  tracks how much time the system has spent in Standby/Sleep Mode or estimates the Remaining Standby Time before the battery is depleted by internal tare loads

name: Pack Total Charge Energy
notes: CORRECT - 0 for me. tracks the cumulative lifetime energy that has been charged into the battery packs

outputs.name: System Power Off Supported
outputs.notes: CORRECT - 0 for me.  FeatureStatus.  1=Enabled, 0=Disabled.For your EP2000, checking this register tells you exactly what the current firmware allows the app to control remotely. If you're trying to automate a Power Off via Modbus, you must first ensure Bit 3 is 1

name: OTA Master Switch
notes: Triggers the firmware update sequence. Monitoring only.

name: Module 1 OTA Status
notes: Status of the first file in the update bundle.

registers.name: Model Name
registers.notes: Legacy Protocol Version is also at this address

name: INV_PV_INFO: Total PV Power
notes: CORRECT - new solar PV production, not including Solaredge

name: INV_PV_INFO: Total PV Energy
notes: CORRECT - check in daytime - should be a sum

name: String 5 Power
notes: probably AC Coupled PV Phase 3 power

name: String 5 Voltage
notes: probably AC Coupled PV Phase 3 voltage

name: String 5 Current
notes: probably AC Coupled PV Phase 3 current

registers.name: Active Cell Count
registers.notes: Source of Truth for cell loops (112)

registers.name: Physical BMU Count
registers.notes: Source of Truth for pack count (7)

name: Number of Parallel Units in Pack
Sync Clock Time
notes: V2 Protocol - Unix Timestamp. May be encrypted

name: Pack 1 Cell Balance Status
notes: V2 Protocol - Bitmask. May be encrypted

name: History Current Record Index
notes: V2 Protocol - Write index to move window. May be encrypted

name: Event Fault Log Index
notes: V2 Protocol - Write to select log entry. May be encrypted

name: Event Timestamp
notes: V2 Protocol - Unix Timestamp. May be encrypted

name: Event Module ID
notes: V2 Protocol - Maps to Type 1-6. May be encrypted

name: Event Code
notes: V2 Protocol - Index for highPowerFault list. May be encrypted
